chapter_title.ar: باب تَفْضِيلِ أَهْلِ الزَّكَاةِ بَعْضِهِمْ عَلَى بَعْضٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 - The preferring of the deserving ones of e Zakāt, some of them over the others

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/91)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/91)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ
عُتَيْبَةَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَجْلَانَ السَّكُونِيِّ

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي رُبَّمَا قَسَمْتُ الشَّيْ‏ءَ بَيْنَ أَصْحَابِي أَصِلُهُمْ بِهِ فَكَيْفَ أُعْطِيهِمْ فَقَالَ أَعْطِهِمْ عَلَى الْهِجْرَةِ فِي الدِّينِ وَ الْعَقْلِ وَ الْفِقْهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Uteyba Bin Abdullah Bin Ijlan Al Sakuny who said,

‘I said to Abu Ja’farasws, ‘Sometimes I distribute something between my companions to maintain good relations by it. So how should I be giving to them?’ So heasws said: ‘Give to them upon the emigration in the Religion (towards Al-Wilayah), and the intellect, and the understanding’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from ‘Utaybah ibn ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Ajlan al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of my gifts, for keeping good relations, to my friends and how I should do it. He (the Imam) said, ‘Give it to them on the basis of their migration to religion, intelligence and fiqh (proper understanding of Shari ‘ah).’”
